headlines.description: — The Buffalo Bills crashed Detroit's Thanksgiving party, making themselves at home for their second victory in five days at Ford Field.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills beat Lions 28-25 for 2nd win in 5 days at Ford Field

events.name: New York Giants at Dallas Cowboys

headlines.description: — CeeDee Lamb could only smile when officials upheld an out-of-bounds call on what the Dallas receiver hoped would be a touchdown on his second one-handed catch of the game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lamb sets table on Thanksgiving as Cowboys beat Giants 28-20

events.name: New England Patriots at Minnesota Vikings

headlines.description: — The Minnesota Vikings have quickly become a confident and resilient team under rookie coach Kevin O'Connell and his staff, and they sure showed it in this short week.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cousins, Vikings rebound from blowout to beat Patriots 33-26
